lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਜਨਿ ਮਾਨਿਆ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਾ ਭਾਣਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jin jan maaniaa prabh kaa bhaanaa |2|
lines.english: who surrender to the Will of God. ||2||
Blessed is their coming into this world,
They alone are handsome, clever and wise,
if they recognize their Lord and Master in each and every heart. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜਾ ਕੇ ਪੂਰਨ ਭਾਗ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak jaa ke pooran bhaag |
lines.english: Says Nanak, their good fortune is perfect,

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਚਰਣੀ ਤਾ ਕਾ ਮਨੁ ਲਾਗ ॥੪॥੯੦॥੧੫੯॥
lines.translit: har charanee taa kaa man laag |4|90|159|
lines.english: if they enshrine the Lord's Feet within their minds. ||4||90||159||

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਹੁ ਬਿਖਈ ਓਸੁ ਰਾਮ ਕੋ ਰੰਗੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ohu bikhee os raam ko rang |1| rahaau |
lines.english: One is in the clutches of vice, while the other is in love with the Lord. ||1||Pause||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਦਾਸ ਸਿਉ ਸਾਕਤ ਨਹੀ ਸੰਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: har ke daas siau saakat nahee sang |
lines.english: The Lord's servant does not associate with the faithless cynic.
or a eunuch caressing a woman. ||1||
It would be like an imaginary rider on a decorated horse,
It would be like tying up an ox and trying to milk it,
the giver of all blessings; it would be like going out shopping without any money. ||3||
or riding a cow to chase a tiger. ||2||
It would be like taking a sheep and worshipping it as the Elysian cow,
Meditate in remembrance on the Lord Master, your Best Friend. ||4||91||160||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
O Nanak, consciously meditate on the Lord's Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਚਰਣ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਕਰਿ ਓਟ ॥
lines.translit: har ke charan hiradai kar ott |
lines.english: Keep the Support of the Lord's Feet in your heart,
Pure and steady is that intellect,
which drinks in the Lord's sublime essence. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਤਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਉਪਜੈ ਨ ਪਾਪੁ ॥
lines.translit: so tan niramal jit upajai na paap |
lines.english: Pure is that body, in which sin does not arise.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਮਰਣ ਤੇ ਹੋਵਤ ਛੋਟ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: janam maran te hovat chhott |1| rahaau |
lines.english: and you shall be saved from the cycle of birth and death. ||1||Pause||
In the Love of the Lord is pure glory. ||2||
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, corruption is eradicated.
This is the greatest blessing of all. ||3||
Imbued with loving devotional worship of the Sustainer of the Universe,
Nanak asks for the dust of the feet of the Holy. ||4||92||161||
Such is my love for the Lord of the Universe;
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
As the wife is delighted upon beholding her husband,
through perfect good destiny, I have been united with Him. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਉ ਹਰਿ ਜਨੁ ਜੀਵੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਚਿਤਾਰੀ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tiau har jan jeevai naam chitaaree |1|
lines.english: so does the Lord's humble servant live by chanting the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||
As the mother is rejuvenated upon seeing her son,
As the greedy man rejoices upon beholding his wealth,

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਤਿ ਪੋਤਿ ਜਨੁ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਰਾਤਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: ot pot jan har siau raataa |2|
lines.english: so is the Lord's humble servant imbued with Him, through and through. ||2||
May I never forget You, for even an instant, O Great Giver!

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਸਿਉ ਲਾਗੋ ਮਨਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jan charan kamal siau laago manaa |3|
lines.english: so is the mind of the Lord's humble servant attached to His Lotus Feet. ||3||
Nanak's God is the Support of his breath of life. ||4||93||162||
Those humble beings who are accustomed to the Lord's sublime essence,
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਨ ਕਮਲ ਪ੍ਰੇਮ ਭਗਤੀ ਬੀਧੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: charan kamal prem bhagatee beedhe |1| rahaau |
lines.english: are pierced through with loving devotional worship of the Lord's Lotus Feet. ||1||Pause||
without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the world is fruitless. ||1||
All other pleasures look like ashes;
Wondrous and Glorious are the Praises of the Lord of the Universe. ||2||
In the woods and meadows, and throughout the three worlds, the Sustainer of the Universe is pervading.
He Himself rescues us from the deep dark well.
The Expansive Lord God is Merciful to all beings. ||3||
Says Nanak, that speech alone is excellent,
which is approved by the Creator Lord. ||4||94||163||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਝੋਲਿ ਮਹਾ ਰਸੁ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਪੀਜੈ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jhol mahaa ras har amrit peejai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Mix and drink in the most delicious, sublime Ambrosial Nectar of the Lord. ||1||Pause||
Every day, take your bath in the Sacred Pool of the Lord.
The water of the Name of the Lord of the Universe is immaculate and pure.
Take your cleansing bath in it, and all your affairs shall be resolved. ||1||
